title: strychnos lucens
intro: Strychnos lucens is a plant species in the family Loganiaceae, native to tropical Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Strychnos lucens include its potential to act as an anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant agent, which may help to alleviate pain and reduce the risk of infections. Herbal preparations of Strychnos lucens can be found in the form of decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
